updates.title: Automation & Mobile Update
changes: Massive spoofing library — 25+ games (Valorant, Fortnite, Apex, GTA V, CS2, Elden Ring, Marvel Rivals, Palworld, and more) plus Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, Crunchyroll, PlayStation, Xbox & Switch.
Custom application-ID spoof builder: paste any Discord App ID + name + assets.
Custom Status (the line under your username) with emoji + text.
Scheduled messages — fire-once at any future time.
Recurring (timed) messages — repeat on any interval.
Auto-react triggers on users and keywords.
AFK auto-responder for DMs with per-user cooldown.
Utility: purge own messages, single DM, mass DM with throttle.
Mobile-first panel redesign — works great on phones.

updates.title: Discord Quests Automation
changes: One-click 'Start All' that runs quests sequentially.
Live status banner with current quest game shown in your Discord profile.

updates.title: Initial Release
changes: Discord RPC editor with live preview.
Game and app spoofing (Minecraft, Genshin, Crunchyroll, PS5).
Password-protected admin panel with token storage.
